actions.action: Post story asset with video caption 1
actions.copy:
I invited you to WorldCup26.

Pick 3 teams for free, see your private points preview, and use a ticket only if you want to enter the paid leaderboard.

Use my referral code 26BC4B90CB when you join:
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=whatsapp-status&utm_medium=manual-post&utm_campaign=worldcup26_referral_72h&utm_content=sienna_h0

The event has not started yet, so all teams are still available right now.
actions.combinedCopy:
I invited you to WorldCup26.

Pick 3 teams for free, see your private points preview, and use a ticket only if you want to enter the paid leaderboard.

If they ask what to do: Sign in, use the code, save 3 picks for free, then use a ticket later only if they want the paid leaderboard.
actions.proofNote: private-whatsapp-status: posted status from <phone/account> at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; visible to contacts; asset media/worldcup26-main-video.mp4; code 26BC4B90CB and link included
actions.proofCommand: node campaign-proof-log.mjs --priority "1" --proof-url "private-whatsapp-status: posted status from <phone/account> at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; visible to contacts; asset media/worldcup26-main-video.mp4; code 26BC4B90CB and link included" --status "posted"

actions.action: Ask approved group admin for permission; post group variant only if allowed
actions.copy:

WorldCup26 is a prediction game where you pick 3 teams free first and see your private points preview.

Paid leaderboard entry happens only when you use a ticket.

actions.action: Reply to first reactions and send the simple how-it-works answer
actions.copy:
Quick version: you pick 3 World Cup teams for free first. They score from real results and you can see your private points preview.

Use a ticket only if you want to enter the paid leaderboard.

Use code 26BC4B90CB here:
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=dm-follow-up&utm_medium=manual-replies&utm_campaign=worldcup26_referral_72h&utm_content=nano_h7

Quick version: you pick 3 World Cup teams for free first. They score from real results and you can see your private points preview.

Use a ticket only if you want to enter the paid leaderboard.

Follow-up:
If they ask why the code matters: it connects the account to the invite. Code 26BC4B90CB.
